name: Turnip Slaw
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Chopped fresh dill or 1/2 teaspoon dried dill
1 lb White turnip, peeled and shredded (4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the mayonnaise, sour cream, tarragon vinegar, mustard, sugar, salt, celery seed, pepper, dill, and turnip.
2. Mix well and refrigerate until needed.
NOTE: The turnip is a neglected root, a vegetable that is never discussed, and rarely seen in public. Here it gets its proper due in a recipe that sets off the little bite in its flavor and the little crunch of its texture. Use it wherever you would coleslaw.
